user.title: Connect to OpenAirTouch
user.description: Enter the URL for the OpenAirTouch add-on HTTP API.

error.invalid_url: Enter a valid HTTP or HTTPS URL.
error.invalid_response: OpenAirTouch responded, but the response was not valid.

abort.already_configured: This OpenAirTouch instance is already configured.
abort.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the discovered OpenAirTouch add-on.
abort.missing_url: OpenAirTouch was discovered, but Home Assistant did not provide the add-on URL.
abort.unknown: Unexpected error setting up the discovered OpenAirTouch add-on.
